title: Watercolors by Brand
intro: TintMap brings together pigment codes, performance notes, and brand libraries so you can compare watercolors in one place. Browse paints by pigment code or by brand, then dive into swatches and technical details.

items.name: Daler Rowney Aquafine
items.description: Daler Rowney Aquafine is the student‑grade watercolor line from the UK brand, designed for learning and everyday practice.

items.name: Daniel Smith
items.description: The brand prioritises marketing over scientific accuracy. Because the pigment chemistry is not precisely disclosed, an accurate comparison of their paints is challenging.

items.name: Blue Pine Arts
items.description: Blue Pine Arts is a professional watercolor brand from India.

items.name: Greenleaf & Blueberry
items.description: Greenleaf & Blueberry is a US professional handmade watercolor brand.

items.name: Kremer Pigments
items.description: Kremer Pigments is a German maker of professional watercolors and artist materials, with a strong focus on traditional pigments and specialist paint making.

items.name: Kuretake Gansai Tambi
items.description: Kuretake Gansai Tambi is a professional watercolor maker from Japan.

items.name: NILA COLORI
items.description: NILA COLORI is an Italian professional watercolor brand focused on artist-grade color and contemporary paint making.

items.name: L'oeil Art Supplies
items.description: L'oeil Art Supplies is a Hong Kong professional watercolor brand.

items.name: MaimeriBlu
items.description: MaimeriBlu is an Italian professional watercolor line known for strong pigments and a traditional European palette.

items.name: Mijello Mission Gold
items.description: Mijello Mission Gold is a professional Korean watercolor line known for vibrant, clean pigments and smooth handling.

items.name: Finetec
items.description: Finetec is a German professional watercolor brand known for specialty and high-quality artist colors.

items.name: Roman Szmal
items.description: Roman Szmal is a Polish professional watercolor brand recognized for its rich granulating and landscape‑focused colors.

items.name: Sennelier
items.description: This exceptional and very high quality watercolor will help you make your works even more powerful due to the liveliness and purity of the hues. The colours mix together perfectly, offering superbly subtle shades. These smooth, intense colours will be a genuine pleasure to paint with. The addition of honey will allow the tubes and pans of Sennelier watercolors to stand up to the passing of time and each time you will paint with them you will be able to accurately translate the diversity of light shape and hues.

items.name: ShinHan Pro (Students)
items.description: ShinHan Pro is a student‑grade watercolor range from South Korea, offering a broad palette at an accessible price point for learners and everyday practice.

items.name: ShinHan PWC (Artist's)
items.description: ShinHan PWC (Professional Water Colour) is the artist‑grade line from South Korea, known for strong pigment strength and a wide, traditional palette.

items.name: Van Gogh
items.description: Van Gogh is a student‑grade line by Royal Talens, offering reliable, affordable watercolors for learning and practice.

items.name: A Gallo
items.description: A. Gallo is a boutique Italian brand making handmade artisan watercolour paints, crafted in the medieval town of Assisi, Umbria, by artist Alina Gallo. It's a highly regarded brand among serious watercolourists for its unusual pigment selection and meticulous production.
